positive: A cosmic bioluminescent scene featuring a stylized constellation map and a floating, mysterious alien planet. The art should evoke deep space, using jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) with glowing accents. Intricate etching style combined with ethereal digital painting, suitable for a vertical poster print.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
